howToApply.subline: Simple 5-step process. Free application. Decision in 48 hours.

steps.title: Apply in 15 Minutes
steps.description: Fill out a simple form — no resume polish needed. We look for curiosity, commitment, and coachability. Not grades, not credentials.

steps.title: Screening Call with a Shark
steps.description: A 45-min call with one of our senior engineers. We work through a small problem together — nothing scary, just how you think.

steps.title: Offer in 48 Hours
steps.description: Choose ISA or upfront payment, pick your cohort date, and lock your seat with a fully refundable ₹5,000 deposit.

steps.title: 2-Week Pre-Cohort Prep
steps.description: Meet your batch, set up your dev environment, complete async prep modules. Arrive on Day 1 with momentum.

steps.title: Day 1 — You're a CodingShark
steps.description: The next 6 months will be the most transformative of your career. Build real products, get mentored, and get placed.

reviews.name: Fahad Husain

reviews.name: Nikhil Joshi

us.name: CodingSharks
points: Real product projects — not toy exercises
Live cohort with weekly code reviews
ISA option — pay only after you get placed

them.name: Others
points: Pre-recorded lectures with no mentor access
High upfront fees regardless of outcome

items.question: Is CodingSharks suitable for complete beginners?
items.answer: Yes — many of our top placements had zero prior coding experience. Our pre-cohort prep module gets you up to speed before Day 1, and your mentor guides you through every step.

items.question: How does the ISA (Income Share Agreement) work?
items.answer: You pay nothing upfront. Once you land a job with a salary above ₹5L/year, you share a fixed percentage for 24 months — capped at a maximum amount. If you don't get placed, you pay nothing.

items.question: What programming languages and technologies are taught?
items.answer: Full Stack track covers JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, AWS, and Docker. AI track adds Python, LangChain, OpenAI APIs, and vector databases.

items.question: Are the classes live or pre-recorded?
items.answer: All core sessions are live with your cohort. Every session is recorded and available within 24 hours so you never fall behind. Workshops, code reviews, and mentor sessions are always live.

items.question: Do students build real projects?
items.answer: Every week you ship something. By the end of the program you'll have 3–5 production-grade projects on GitHub with real users — not tutorial clones — which is exactly what interviewers want to see.

items.question: How long does it take to get placed after completing the program?
items.answer: Most students receive their first offer within 4–8 weeks of completing the program. Our placement team actively connects you with hiring partners and prepares you through mock interviews and referrals.

finalCta.subline: Join 15,000+ developers who chose to build, not just watch tutorials.
